basics.name: Junteng Liu
basics.summary: First-year PhD candidate at HKUST NLP Group. Research focuses on natural language processing and machine learning, with interests in LLM Reasoning, Reinforcement Learning, VLM Hallucination, and LLM Truthfulness/Interpretability.

work.summary: Research intern working on natural language processing and machine learning.
Research intern advised by Zifei Shan.
Research intern advised by Prof. Yu Cheng.

education.institution: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology

publications.name: SynLogic: Synthesizing Verifiable Reasoning Data at Scale for Learning Logical Reasoning and Beyond
publications.summary: First author. Co-authored with Yuanxiang Fan, Zhuo Jiang, Han Ding, Yongyi Hu, Chi Zhang, Yiqi Shi, Shitong Weng, Aili Chen, Shiqi Chen, Yunan Huang, Mozhi Zhang, Pengyu Zhao, Junjie Yan, Junxian He.

publications.name: On the Perception Bottleneck of VLMs for Chart Understanding
publications.summary: First author. Co-authored with Weihao Zeng, Xiwen Zhang, Yijun Wang, Zifei Shan, Junxian He. Code available as Vision4Chart.

publications.name: On the Universal Truthfulness Hyperplane Inside LLMs
publications.summary: First author. Co-authored with Shiqi Chen, Yu Cheng, Junxian He. Code available as Universal_Truthfulness_Hyperplane.

publications.name: In-Context Sharpness as Alerts: An Inner Representation Perspective for Hallucination Mitigation
publications.summary: Co-authored with Shiqi Chen, Miao Xiong, Zhengxuan Wu, Teng Xiao, Siyang Gao, Junxian He.

publications.name: C-Eval: A Multi-Level Multi-Discipline Chinese Evaluation Suite for Foundation Models
publications.summary: Co-authored with Yuzhen Huang, Yuzhuo Bai, Zhihao Zhu, Junlei Zhang, Jinghan Zhang, Tangjun Su, Chuancheng Lv, Yikai Zhang, Jiayi Lei, Yao Fu, Maosong Sun, Junxian He.

publications.name: Composing Parameter-Efficient Modules with Arithmetic Operations
publications.summary: Co-authored with Jinghan Zhang, Shiqi Chen, Junxian He.
